scripts.build: echo "export const environment = { production: true, firebase: { apiKey: '$FIREBASE_API_KEY', authDomain: '$FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN', projectId: '$FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID', storageBucket: '$FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET', messagingSenderId: '$FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID', appId: '$FIREBASE_APP_ID' } };" > src/environments/environment.ts && ng build
